data.name: HeadphonesCueMatrixHint
data.value: Use this player's matrix above to choose which input channels feed the cue bus.

data.name: NoOutputsConfiguredHint
data.value: No outputs configured yet — add one above. Click Play with nothing selected to auto-route.

data.name: TransitionTooltip
data.value: Fade: the incoming clip fades up from black over the duration below, on load and on auto-advance (video only — this is a per-clip fade-in, not a cross-fade between tracks; the outgoing clip and audio are not faded). Cut: start instantly. IdleImage: reserved, currently behaves like Cut.

data.name: IdleImageHeaderTooltip
data.value: Show a still image on every video output instead of decoded pixels — image content is letterboxed into each output's active format.

data.name: HoldFallbackToggleTooltip
data.value: When on, video outputs display the image instead of decoded frames.

data.name: SharedHeadphonesBusesHint
data.value: Named monitor buses backed by a PortAudio output. Multiple players can route their cue send into the same bus.

data.name: QuickPlayDropTooltip
data.value: Drop media files here to play immediately (quick-play)

data.name: ProjectPathFallback
data.value: (Unsaved — choose Save Project As… to write to disk)

data.name: RecentProjectsEmptyHint
data.value: (None yet — recent projects appear after the first Save or Open.)

data.name: DisplaySettingsHint
data.value: Theme and density apply to this machine and persist in app-settings.json — they are not saved in the project.

data.name: OscConnectionsHint
data.value: Named OSC targets for action cues. Cues store endpoint GUIDs, not host/port.

data.name: MidiHint
data.value: Output endpoints for action cues and the local PortMidi device catalog.

data.name: CueListNameTooltip
data.value: Edit the selected cue list name.

data.name: LoadCueListTooltip
data.value: Load a cue list from a .haplaycues file (adds to the workspace).

data.name: SaveCueListTooltip
data.value: Save the selected cue list to its file, or choose a path with Save As.

data.name: CueListFilesMenuTooltip
data.value: Load or save individual cue lists (.haplaycues) or all lists at once (.haplaycuelists) without saving the full project.

data.name: CueDetailsEmptyHint
data.value: Select a cue from the list to edit trigger, routing, media, or action settings.

data.name: SelectACueDrawerHint
data.value: Select a cue to configure it.

data.name: NoAudioRoutesHint
data.value: No audio routes on this cue yet. Add one to route a source channel to an audio output.

data.name: NoVideoPlacementsHint
data.value: No video placements on this cue yet. Add one to put the cue into a composition.

data.name: NoVideoOutputLinesHint
data.value: No video output lines configured yet. Add a Local or NDI output in the Output Management view first.

data.name: AudioTrackTooltip
data.value: Multi-track source (e.g. MKV with several languages). Picks which audio track this cue plays; Automatic uses the container's default.

data.name: CueTransportStandbyTooltip
data.value: Put the selected cue on standby (Enter)

data.name: EditCuesToggleTooltip
data.value: Reorder mode: drag rows to move them. Keys on the cue list: F2 rename · Del remove · Ctrl+D duplicate · Ctrl+↑/↓ move

data.name: ActionTargetsButtonTooltip
data.value: Configure named OSC/MIDI targets for action cues

data.name: AudioTrackChangedStatusFormat
data.value: Audio track changed for {0} — applies when the item is (re)opened.

data.name: MultiSelectAudioBannerFormat
data.value: {0} cues selected — "+ Route" adds a route to each.

data.name: MultiSelectVideoBannerFormat
data.value: {0} cues selected — "+ Placement" adds a placement to each.

data.name: VideoTabAttachedPictureHint
data.value: This source's only video is an attached picture (e.g. album art). Placements use that still frame as a static layer.

data.name: NoVideoOutputsHint
data.value: No video output bindings on this cue list. Add one above.

data.name: NoAudioOutputsHint
data.value: No audio output bindings on this cue list. Add one above.

data.name: RebindMissingOutputsDescription
data.value: Some player routes reference outputs that are not in this project. Pick a replacement for each missing name.

data.name: RebindMissingActionEndpointsDescription
data.value: Some action cues reference endpoint IDs that are not in this project. Pick a replacement for each missing ID (all cues using that ID will update).

data.name: PortAudioInputDeviceMatchHint
data.value: The device is matched by name on next load; the global index is used only as a fallback so swapping the USB port doesn't silently break the binding.

data.name: OutputTypeLockedByEditHint
data.value: (Output type cannot change on an existing output — remove and re-add.)

data.name: CloneOfHint
data.value: When set, this output mirrors the parent's video stream. Routing follows the parent automatically.

data.name: VideoFormatLockHint
data.value: When set, receivers see a fixed pixel format and/or resolution regardless of the source. Leave on 'Auto' for receivers to pick the cheapest negotiation.

data.name: LiveDiscoveredSourcesTooltip
data.value: Pick from NDI sources currently visible on the network.

data.name: ManualSourceNameHint
data.value: Manual entries load even if the source is offline today — the playlist enters 'waiting for source' on Play until the sender appears.

data.name: NdiVideoOnlyBehaviorHint
data.value: Video-only items drive NDI video without audio. Audio+video items use separate receivers on the same source name.

data.name: NdiLiveAudioResampleHint
data.value: NDI sample rate differs from this output — resampling adds delay and may cause drops. Set the PortAudio device to 48 kHz if the NDI source is 48 kHz.

data.name: EngineInAppPreviewSubtitle
data.value: Avalonia — paints on the UI thread, lives inside the app shell

data.name: EngineStandaloneWindowSubtitle
data.value: SDL3 — own thread, dedicated fullscreen-capable window

data.name: ValidationNdiResolutionInvalid
data.value: Custom resolution must be even numbers between 16 and 7680 × 4320.

data.name: ValidationSelectHostApiAndOutputDevice
data.value: Select a host API and output device.

data.name: ValidationSelectHostApiAndInputDevice
data.value: Select a host API and input device.

data.name: ValidationChannelCountRangeForDevice
data.value: Channel count must be between 1 and {0} for this device.

data.name: ValidationSampleRateInvalid
data.value: Sample rate looks invalid (expected roughly 8 kHz–192 kHz).

data.name: ValidationWindowedSizeInvalid
data.value: Windowed mode needs a reasonable width and height (at least about 320×240).

data.name: ValidationNdiAudioChannelCountInvalid
data.value: NDI audio channel count must be between 1 and 64.

data.name: ValidationDiscoveryPickOrManual
data.value: Pick a discovered source, or switch to manual name.

data.name: ValidationAudioOnlyAndVideoOnlyMutuallyExclusive
data.value: Audio-only and video-only can't both be set.

data.name: ValidationRetryIntervalRange
data.value: Retry interval must be between 0 and 600 seconds.

data.name: NdiDiscoveryUnavailableStatus
data.value: NDI discovery unavailable (rc={0}). Switch to manual name.

data.name: NdiDiscoveryNoSourcesStatus
data.value: No NDI sources visible yet — check sender power, network, and groups.

data.name: OutputManagementHint
data.value: Configured audio / video destinations. Right-click a local-video row for preview controls.

data.name: NoOutputsEmptyHint
data.value: No outputs yet. Add a local video, PortAudio, or NDI output to make routing targets available.

data.name: NoPreviewActionsMenuHeader
data.value: No preview actions for this output type.

data.name: OutputThroughputTooltip
data.value: Throughput over the last minute (frames + audio chunks per second).

data.name: OutputIdleTooltip
data.value: Idle — no active playback on this line

data.name: MediaPlayerSettingsTooltip
data.value: Save or load this player's configuration (.haplay.json), playlists, or remove the player.

data.name: NoMediaLoadedHint
data.value: No media loaded — pick an item from the playlist below.

data.name: SeekSliderTooltip
data.value: Drag to scrub. Keys: Space play/pause · [ ] prev/next · , . jog ±5 s · Home to start · + - volume.

data.name: PlayPauseTooltip
data.value: Play or pause the current track. Space

data.name: DownmixPresetsTooltip
data.value: Quick-apply a channel mapping. Overwrites the cells. A preset that doesn't fit the current source/output channel count is ignored.

data.name: DownmixNoOutputStatus
data.value: No audio output line available to apply a downmix preset to.

data.name: DownmixNotApplicableStatusFormat
data.value: Downmix '{0}' doesn't fit {1} source × {2} output channels — skipped.

data.name: LoopToggleTooltip
data.value: Restart the current track when it ends.

data.name: AutoAdvanceToggleTooltip
data.value: When on, the next playlist entry loads and plays automatically when the current track ends.

data.name: ShuffleToggleTooltip
data.value: When auto-advancing, play tracks in a random order (each once per cycle). Manual Next/Previous stay in list order.

data.name: RepeatAllToggleTooltip
data.value: When auto-advancing past the last track, wrap back to the first instead of stopping. (Loop repeats the single current track.)

data.name: PlaylistCardTooltip
data.value: Double-click a row to load + play. Single-click selects so Play loads that file.

data.name: AddLiveInputTooltip
data.value: Add a live source (PortAudio capture device or NDI receiver) to this playlist tab.

data.name: RoutingHint
data.value: Tick the outputs this player should drive.

data.name: MixPresetTooltip
data.value: Preset that overwrites the matrix below for this device — Stereo identity, Swap L↔R, Mono-from-L, Mono-from-R, or Silence.

data.name: PerDeviceGainTooltip
data.value: Per-device gain in dB. Composes on top of every cell of the matrix below.

data.name: AudioMatrixEmptyHint
data.value: Tick an output above and load media — the per-cell matrix appears here, sized to the source's channel count.

data.name: NoActiveRoutesHint
data.value: No active routes — raise a matrix cell above -60 dB or unmute it.

data.name: OutputEditInUseDialogTitle
data.value: Apply edit while output is in use?

data.name: OutputEditInUseDialogMessageFormat
data.value: '{0}' is currently delivering audio/video to a running player. Applying the edit will cause a brief silence / black-frame on that output (typically 1–2 frames). Continue?

data.name: NdiPumpPressureStatusFormat
data.value: NDI output '{0}' dropped {1} frames in the last 5 s (total {2}) — receiver may be slow.

data.name: VideoFrameRateMismatchWarningFormat
data.value: Source {0} fps → {1} fps canvas '{2}' — visible pulldown judder likely. Consider matching the composition frame rate to the source.

data.name: ProjectMissingRoutesStatusFormat
data.value: {0} player route(s) still reference missing outputs: {1}.

data.name: MidiActionRequiresMessage
data.value: MIDI action requires a message (e.g. 'noteon 60 100', 'pitchbend 0', or 'sysex F0 7D 00 F7').

data.name: NoPortAudioOutputForHeadphonesCueBus
data.value: No PortAudio output available for headphones cue bus.

data.name: PlaybackFailedToResumeAfterLoading
data.value: Playback failed to resume after loading.

data.name: AutoRoutedStatusFormat
data.value: Auto-routed to {0} — {1}. Change in Routing below.

data.name: CuePanicStatus
data.value: Panic stop: all cue transport state cleared.

data.name: PlayerSettingsTooltip
data.value: Open player settings (output format, transitions, idle image, headphones cue bus)

data.name: AudioMatrixButtonTooltip
data.value: Open the audio matrix editor (per-output mix mode, gain, input trims, per-cell routing)

data.name: RoutingEditTooltip
data.value: Open routing configuration (add/remove outputs, headphones cue bus)

data.name: TransportKeyboardHints
data.value: Space play/pause · [ ] prev/next · , . jog ±5 s · Home start · + - volume

data.name: DetachPlayerTooltip
data.value: Pop this player out into its own window

data.name: CuePreviewWaveformHint
data.value: Waveform overview of the selected cue's audio

data.name: CuePreviewNoAudioHint
data.value: No audio waveform available for this cue.

data.name: PlaybackOptionsTooltip
data.value: Loop, auto-advance, shuffle and repeat-all options for this player

data.name: AddToPlaylistTooltip
data.value: Add files or a live input (PortAudio / NDI) to this playlist

data.name: PlaylistDragReorderHint
data.value: Drag rows to reorder · double-click to play · drop files to add

data.name: BackgroundImageHint
data.value: Shown on this output when it is idle (no media routed). Letterboxed to the output size.

data.name: AlwaysOnTopHint
data.value: Always-on-top applies to the In-app preview engine; the Standalone window engine ignores it.

data.name: LoadControlConfigTooltip
data.value: Load a control system from a .scontrol file (devices, layers, scripts, listeners).

data.name: SaveControlConfigTooltip
data.value: Save the control system to its file, or choose a path with Save As.

data.name: ControlFilesMenuTooltip
data.value: Load or save the control workspace (.scontrol) without saving the full project.

data.name: VirtualChannelsMigratedToast
data.value: This project used virtual audio channels (VOut); that model was replaced by output aliases and routing matrix presets. Review your player routing.

data.name: PlayersDeckHint
data.value: Double-tap a player to focus it; Esc returns to the grid. Drop media files on a player to quick-play.

data.name: HoldButtonTooltip
data.value: Hold image: show the configured idle image on this player's video outputs. Pick the image via the arrow button.

data.name: SectionsImportedToastFormat
data.value: Imported sections from file: {0}. The current project path is unchanged.

data.name: ExportSectionsDialogHint
data.value: The exported file carries only the checked sections. Opening it later imports just those sections into the running show without replacing anything else.

data.name: AutoPresetRulesHint
data.value: When media with a matching audio channel count loads, the preset is applied to the routing matrix automatically. Without a rule, extra channels beyond the outputs are dropped (identity mapping).

data.name: NowPlayingSeekLockTooltip
data.value: Unlock to allow seeking by tapping the progress bars below. Locked by default so a stray tap next to GO cannot jump a running cue.

data.name: NowPlayingSeekTooltip
data.value: Tap to seek (when unlocked via the padlock above)

data.name: NowPlayingGroupExpandTooltip
data.value: Show the individual cues in this group

data.name: NowPlayingGroupCancelTooltip
data.value: Stop every cue in this group

data.name: OutputDetailEmptyHint
data.value: Select an output on the left to see its details and live stats.

data.name: OutputAliasTooltip
data.value: Rename this output (alias shown everywhere). Clearing the field restores the device name.

data.name: ImportLayerNoLayersStatus
data.value: The selected file contains no layers.

data.name: NoCompositionsToExportStatus
data.value: The selected cue list has no compositions to export.

data.name: PopoutButtonTooltip
data.value: Pop out into a separate window

data.name: PopoutTabButtonTooltip
data.value: Pop out the selected tab into a separate window

data.name: PopoutPlaceholderFormat
data.value: {0} is open in a separate window.

data.name: MappingButtonTooltip
data.value: Cut this output's composition into individually movable/warpable sections (multi-panel or uneven projection surfaces)

data.name: MappingNeedsCompositionToast
data.value: Pick a composition for this output first — the mapping cuts that composition's canvas into sections.

data.name: SoundboardEditModeTooltip
data.value: Edit mode: tap a tile to configure it, drag sound files onto tiles, adjust the board grid and defaults

data.name: SoundboardTileNameTooltip
data.value: Optional alias shown on the tile — leave empty to show the filename

data.name: SoundboardNoTileSelectedHint
data.value: Tap a tile to edit it, or drop a sound file onto a tile to bind it.

data.name: RemoteApiSecurityLoopback
data.value: Loopback only. Every request requires the token; copied URLs include ?key= automatically.

data.name: RemoteApiSecurityLan
data.value: LAN access enabled. Every request requires the token; use only on a trusted show network.

data.name: RemoteApiHint
data.value: Token-protected HTTP control for show controllers. GET or POST; all indices are 1-based, matching the UI labels. Right-click soundboard tiles or playlist items to copy their exact URL.

data.name: RemoteApiDocCues
data.value: Cue player transport (go fires the standby/selected cue)

data.name: RemoteApiDocPlayerTransport
data.value: Media player transport (player = number or name)

data.name: RemoteApiDocPlayerHold
data.value: Hold image on/off — without ?on it toggles

data.name: RemoteApiDocTile
data.value: Soundboard tile — bare URL = tap (same as touching it)
